title: Guaranteed Selection Request Schema
description: Request parameters for a guaranteed optimizer mode. selection_mode keep_accuracy_reduce_cost requires a baseline_ref; accuracy_then_cost selects the empirical accuracy peak as the anchor. delta is the accuracy non-inferiority margin; epsilon is the failure probability of the whole guarantee (allocated across accuracy and cost as a single global event).

delta.description: Accuracy non-inferiority margin (e.g. 0.02 = within 2 accuracy points of the anchor).

epsilon.description: Failure probability of the guarantee (confidence is 1 - epsilon).

epsilon_allocation.description: Optional explicit split; acc + cost must be <= epsilon. Defaults to epsilon/2 each.

eta.description: Cost-optimality tolerance for ties between candidates (interpreted per eta_kind).

baseline_ref.description: Reference to the baseline config (config_id) anchoring keep_accuracy_reduce_cost.

min_pairs.description: Minimum paired fixed-benchmark tasks required before a candidate can be decided.

cost_value_range.description: Upper bound on per-example cost (e.g. max_output_tokens * price). Null treats cost as deterministic on the eval workload.

allow_best_effort_uncertified.description: Opt-in: when no config can be certified, return a BEST_EFFORT_UNCERTIFIED suggestion. Still never deployable.
